name: run_enformer_predict
description: Predict genomic track activity (CAGE/DNase/ATAC/ChIP; 5,313 human or 1,643 mouse tracks) directly from a DNA sequence using Enformer (Avsec 2021), which integrates long-range regulatory interactions. The sequence is center-cropped / N-padded to 196,608 bp. Returns the central-bin value for requested tracks, or the top-signal tracks.

sequence.description: DNA sequence (A/C/G/T/N). Cropped/padded to 196,608 bp around its center.

track_indices.description: Track indices to report (optional). If omitted, the top-signal tracks are returned.

top_n.description: When track_indices is omitted, how many top tracks to return (default 20).

name: run_enformer_variant_effect
description: Score a regulatory variant with Enformer: predicts tracks for the reference and alternate sequences (each 196,608 bp, variant at center) and returns the central-bin delta (alt - ref) per track — the canonical sequence-model variant-effect-on-expression score.

ref_sequence.description: Reference DNA sequence centered on the variant (cropped/padded to 196,608 bp).

alt_sequence.description: Alternate DNA sequence (same length/centering as ref).

track_indices.description: Track indices to report (optional; default = top |delta| tracks).

top_n.description: When track_indices omitted, number of top |delta| tracks to return (default 20).
